title: SSL handshake failure in HTTP node
symptom: The HTTP node fails with a '525 SSL fail handshake' error during execution. This indicates an issue with the SSL configuration.
not_this_if: Error does not occur during HTTP node execution
root_cause: The SSL handshake failure typically occurs due to incompatible SSL/TLS versions or cipher suites between the client and server. If the server is not configured to support the required protocols or ciphers, the handshake will fail.
fix_steps: Modify the Traefik configuration in the docker-compose.yaml file to include the appropriate TLS settings.
Create or update the traefik_conf.yaml file with the desired minimum TLS version and cipher suites.
Restart the Traefik container using 'docker-compose up -d' to apply the changes.
agent_instruction: Update the Traefik configuration to support the required TLS settings and restart the container.
